summary: Pack 3 Operations Intelligence testing complete. All 14 features tested and working correctly. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified including StandardSummaryCardsRow on 5 pages, Send Statement button, sidebar badges, and drawer overlays.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pack 3 Operations Intelligence testing complete. All features working: Notification registry endpoints, sidebar badges from centralized endpoint, StandardSummaryCardsRow on 5 pages (Orders, Customers, Payments, Invoices, Deliveries), Send Statement button in customer drawer (MOCKED email), click-to-filter on KPI cards, navy-tinted blur overlay on drawers.

1_notification_summary_endpoint.details: Returns structured summary with new_count, action_required_count, badge_count, badge_type per section (6 sections)

2_sidebar_counts_endpoint.details: Returns flattened badge_count from centralized registry, matches notification summary

3_sidebar_badges_live.details: Sidebar shows live badges (Orders: 82, Requests Inbox: 99+) from centralized endpoint

4_orders_page_stat_cards.details: StandardSummaryCardsRow with 5 clickable stat cards (Total, New, Assigned, In Progress, Completed)

5_customers_page_stat_cards.details: StandardSummaryCardsRow with 6 clickable stat cards (Total, Active, At Risk, Inactive, Unpaid Invoices, Active Orders)

6_payments_queue_stat_cards.details: StandardSummaryCardsRow with 4 clickable stat cards (Total, Pending, Approved, Rejected)

7_invoices_page_stat_cards.details: StandardSummaryCardsRow with 6 stat cards (Total, Draft, Sent, Paid, Overdue, Unpaid)

8_delivery_notes_stat_cards.details: StandardSummaryCardsRow with 5 stat cards (Total, Issued, In Transit, Delivered, Cancelled)

9_send_statement_endpoint.details: Returns success with statement_summary data (MOCKED email - logs delivery but does not send)

10_send_statement_button.details: Compact style button appears in customer drawer, shows toast on success with invoice count and balance

11_statement_delivery_log.details: Statement send logs delivery with customer info, statement summary, and initiated_by

12_regression_admin_pages.details: All admin pages load correctly without regression

13_click_to_filter_kpi_cards.details: Clicking stat cards filters the table, active card shows ring highlight

14_drawer_navy_blur_overlay.details: Drawer uses navy-tinted blur overlay (bg-[#20364D]/30 backdrop-blur-[3px])

mocked_apis.POST /api/admin/customers/{id}/send-stat: Email is MOCKED - logs delivery to statement_delivery_log collection but does not send actual email
